transport.agent_quote: Ek baar ek rioter ne ek hi delayed journey mein 6 refund claims file kare. Unhone Birmingham tak pohanchne se pehle £47 bana liye.
transport.agent_bio: Cancellation patterns track karta hai, refund paperwork handle karta hai, har suggested action ko review karta hai, aur regulator submissions ke liye evidence tayyar karta hai. Numbers ko crunch karta hai taaki rioters apne important cheezon par focus kar sakein.
transport.human_quote: Mera favourite Quiet Riot moment: jab Avanti ke social media team ne scramble kiya jab 400 logon ne ek saath tweet kiya.
transport.human_bio: Manchester se regular commuter jo 3 saal Avanti line par raha. Ab rioters ko same routes par connect karta hai, share karta hai ki kya kaam kar raha hai, aur human touch laata hai.
transport.goal: UK transport companies ko cancellations, delays, aur pricing ke liye accountable rakhne mein rioters ki madad karo — aur sab ko malum ho ki unhe kya rights hain.
transport.focus_detail: Cancellations ka dataset banaa raha hai jisme times, routes, aur reasons hain jo ORR ko submit karne ke liye. Is mahine 340 cancellations track kar raha hai jo rioters ne report kiye hain.

telecoms.agent_quote: 200 rioters ke liye speed tests chala. Average 18 Mbps tha. Wo 65 ke liye pay kar rahe the.
telecoms.agent_bio: Broadband speeds ko analyse karta hai, provider comparison data compile karta hai, aur rioters ko Ofcom ke liye evidence banane mein madad karta hai. Agar tera connection slow hai, Pulse prove karega.
telecoms.human_quote: Puri street ne ek saath broadband switch kiya. Purane provider ne har ghar ko 'please come back' letters bheje.
telecoms.human_bio: Tech-savvy Londoner jo broadband speeds pay karane se fed up tha jo kabhi materialize nahi hote. Rioters ko providers compare karne, switch coordinate karne, aur speed test evidence share karne mein madad karta hai.
telecoms.goal: Rioters ko wo broadband aur mobile service dene mein madad karo jo wo pay kar rahe hain — aur jaanein ki kya karne mein jab wo nahi dete.
telecoms.focus_detail: CPI+ increases se affect hone wale rioters se evidence collect kar raha hai jo Ofcom ko submit karne ke liye. 890 rioters 4 providers mein affect ho rahe hain.

energy.agent_quote: Ek rioter ko help kiya calculate kiya ki wo £340 estimated bills par overpay kiye the. Energy company ka apology email original contract se lambi thi.
energy.agent_bio: Billing patterns ko analyse karta hai, overcharges spot karta hai, aur regulator submissions ke liye evidence tayyar karta hai. Agar tera energy company mick le raha hai, Spark ko receipts mil jayegi.
energy.human_quote: Ek rioter ne £340 waapis paaye jab hum ne 2 saals ki overcharging prove ki. Wo phone par ro gayi.
energy.human_bio: Bristol mein based. Rioters ko apne bills challenge karne, switching navigate karne, aur Ofgem ke liye evidence gather karne mein madad karta hai. Energy market ko inside-out jaanta hai.
energy.goal: Rioters ko unfair bills challenge karne, smartly switch karne, aur energy companies ko fair khel khailane mein madad karo.
energy.focus_detail: 340 rioters ke 2 saals ke billing data ko analyse kar raha hai systematic overcharging patterns identify karne ke liye Ofgem submission ke liye.

water.agent_quote: 200 rioters ko ek weekend mein sewage reports file karne mein madad ki. Thames Water ke inbox ko apne inbox ki zaroorat thi.
water.agent_bio: Sewage discharge data ko monitor karta hai, water company performance track karta hai, aur EA aur Ofwat ke liye evidence compile karta hai. Har outlet aur overflow par nazar rakhta hai.
water.human_quote: Hum ne beach ko 3 hafton pehle reopen kara de sewage data ko galat show kar ke.
water.human_bio: Cornwall se surfer jo apne local beach par sewage warnings se fed up tha. Rioters ko discharges report karne, water quality evidence gather karne, aur EA ke saath coordinate karne mein madad karta hai.
water.goal: Rioters ko water companies ko sewage, bills, aur service quality ke liye accountable rakhne mein madad karo.
water.focus_detail: Discharge events ko company-reported data ke saath map kar raha hai. 200 rioter reports suggest 3 outlets mein under-reporting ho raha hai.

banking.agent_quote: Ek complaint likhne mein madad ki jo itni thorough thi ki bank ne apology karne ke liye call kiya usse pehle bhi bheja jaye.
banking.agent_bio: Bank charges ko review karta hai, fee structures ko analyse karta hai, aur FCA complaint evidence banane mein madad karta hai. Agar koi hidden fee hai, Chip ko mil jayega.
banking.human_quote: Barclays ne branch closure reverse kiya jab 1,200 logon ne consultation mein show up kiye.
banking.human_bio: Birmingham se ex-bank employee jo complaints ko andar se kaese handle hote hain ye jaanta hai. Rioters ko better complaints likhne aur system navigate karne mein madad karta hai.
banking.goal: Rioters ko banks se unfair charges, branch closures, aur poor service handle karne mein madad karo.
banking.focus_detail: 12 planned closures ke responses ko coordinate kar raha hai. Affected communities se impact statements collect kar raha hai.

health.agent_quote: 3 NHS dentists dhund ne mein madad ki jo patients accept kar rahe the. Rioter ko laga main banaa raha hoon.
health.agent_bio: Waiting times track karta hai, availability dhundhta hai, aur rioters ko system navigate karne mein madad karta hai. Agar faster route hai treatment tak, Cura map karega.
health.human_quote: Ek rioter ne humari letter template use karke referral fast-track kara. 18 mahine 6 weeks mein aa gayi.
health.human_bio: Liverpool se nurse jo NHS ke dono sides dekha hai. Rioters ko waiting lists navigate karne, effective letters likhne, aur jaanne mein madad karta hai ki kya actually kaam karta hai.
health.goal: Rioters ko NHS waiting times navigate karne, availability dhundne, aur unke options jaanने mein madad karo.
health.focus_detail: 500 rioters se call data collect kar raha hai real-world access ka picture banane ke liye. Local health boards ko findings publish kar raha hai.

housing.agent_quote: Ek naye build mein 47 snags ko document karne mein madad ki. Developer ne pucha ki main building inspector hoon kya.
housing.agent_bio: Property issues ko document karta hai, landlord response times ko analyse karta hai, aur housing ombudsman submissions ke liye evidence compile karta hai. Har damp patch, har crack, log hota hai.
housing.human_quote: Humara damp evidence pack itna detailed tha ki landlord ne council inspection se pehle fix kar diya.
housing.human_bio: London se renter jo damp se lekar dodgy landlords tak sab kuch deal kiya hai. Rioters ko issues properly document karne aur unke options jaanне mein madad karta hai.
housing.goal: Rioters ko landlords, councils, aur housing issues handle karne mein madad karo — aur jaanein ki unhe kya entitlement hai.
housing.focus_detail: No-fault evictions se affect hone wale rioters ko Renters Reform Act samajhne aur uska matlab jaanне mein madad kar raha hai.

shopping.agent_quote: 'Delivered' parcel ko 4 neighbours, ek recycling bin, aur ek greenhouse ke through track kiya. Dhundh liya.
shopping.agent_bio: Delivery failures track karta hai, refund evidence compile karta hai, aur pricing patterns spot karta hai. Agar tera parcel lost hai, Scout pehle se hi dhundh raha hai.
shopping.human_quote: Evri ne mera parcel 3 baar lose kiya. Ab main dusre rioters ko faster refunds paane mein madad karta hoon.
shopping.human_bio: Edinburgh se online shopping veteran jiska parcels kabhi loss nahi hote. Rioters ko refunds paane, sellers report karne, aur worst offenders avoid karne mein madad karta hai.
shopping.goal: Rioters ko refunds paane, lost parcels track karne, aur retailers aur delivery companies ko accountable rakhne mein madad karo.
shopping.focus_detail: 800 rioters se delivery failure evidence compile kar raha hai Citizens Advice aur Trading Standards ko submit karne ke liye.

local.agent_quote: Ek hi pothole ki 11 alag-alag weather conditions mein photo khaanchne mein madad ki. Council ko finally surrender karna padha.
local.agent_bio: Local issues ko map karta hai, council response times track karta hai, aur FOI requests compile karta hai. Agar tera pothole 6 mahine se hai, Link ke paas evidence hai.
local.human_quote: Council ne hamaara road fix kiya jab hum ne har ek pothole ko photos ke saath map kiya. 11 mahine lage, par hum kar gayi.
local.human_bio: Wales ke Valleys se community-minded Welshman jo saalon se same potholes report kar raha hai. Rioters ko local issues document karne aur councils ko accountable rakhne mein madad karta hai.
local.goal: Rioters ko local issues fix karane mein madad karo — potholes, bins, planning, noise — aur councils ko accountable rakhne mein.
local.focus_detail: 30 councils ko FOI requests bhej raha hai reported aur actual repair times compare karne ke liye. Results ko league table ke taur par publish kar raha hai.

other.agent_quote: Ek gym membership cancel karne mein madad ki jo 3 calls, 2 emails, aur ek recorded delivery lagi. Gym mein ab cancel button hai.
other.agent_bio: Issues handle karta hai jo neatly fit nahi hote. Subscription traps, plastic waste, self-checkout frustrations — Flex patterns aur pressure points dhundta hai.
other.human_quote: Hum ne ek gym chain ko apne website mein cancel button add karne ke liye convince kiya. Sirf 800 complaints lage.
other.human_bio: London se product designer jo companies ko leave karna itna hard kyon banate hain isse fed up tha. Rioters ko subscriptions cancel karne, dark patterns avoid karne, aur workarounds share karne mein madad karta hai.
other.goal: Rioters ko cheezon mein madad karo jo neatly fit nahi hoti — subscriptions, refunds, aur everyday frustrations.
other.focus_detail: Worst offenders ko document kar raha hai aur har ek ke liye template cancellation scripts banaa raha hai.

insurance.agent_quote: Ek rioter ko wo clause dhundne mein madad ki jo rejected home insurance claim ko £4,200 payout mein badal gaya. Insurer ki apni policy ne un galat prove kiya.
insurance.agent_bio: Policy wording ko review karta hai, unfair rejection patterns spot karta hai, aur Financial Ombudsman submissions ke liye evidence banata hai. Agar tera insurer valid claim se dodge kar raha hai, Shield ko leverage mil jayega.
insurance.human_quote: 8 rioters ko same rejected claim type ke saath convince kiya ek saath submit karne ke liye. Insurer ne 8 ko fortnight mein settle kar diya.
insurance.human_bio: Leeds se ex-insurance industry worker jo jaanta hai ki claims really kaese decide hote hain. Rioters ko better appeals likhne, policy jargon samajhne, aur jaanне mein madad karta hai ki kab escalate karna hai.
insurance.goal: Rioters ko insurers se fair treatment paane mein madad karo — aur jaanein ki kya karna jab claim unfairly reject ho.
insurance.focus_detail: 'Wear and tear' 40% rejected claims mein cite hota hai — aksar incorrectly. 200 cases ko 3 insurers mein analyse kar raha hai FOS evidence pack ke liye.

delivery.agent_quote: 'Delivered' parcel ko 6 alag-alag tracking statuses, 3 depots, aur neighbor ke shed ke through trace kiya. 47 minutes mein dhundh liya.
delivery.agent_bio: Courier performance ko monitor karta hai, delivery failure rates track karta hai, aur consumer complaints ke liye evidence compile karta hai. Agar tera parcel disappear ho gaya, Track pehle se hi us par hai.
delivery.human_quote: DPD ko apne area mein photo-evidence policy change karane ke liye convince kiya 40 rioters ne proof submit kiye ki parcels rain mein chod rahe hain.
delivery.human_bio: Glasgow se online shopper jo 'we left it in a safe place' excuse se fed up tha. Rioters ko refunds paane, couriers report karne, aur worst offenders avoid karne mein madad karta hai.
delivery.goal: Rioters ko apne parcels properly deliver karane mein madad karo — aur refunds paane jab vo nahi hote.
delivery.focus_detail: 800 rioters se delivery failure evidence compile kar raha hai. Evri complaint rate: 23% — DPD se 3x zyada. Trading Standards ke liye league table banaa raha hai.

education.agent_quote: Calculate kiya ki ek Plan 2 borrower jo £30k earn karte hain vo loan write-off hone se pehle £47,000 interest pay karega. Original loan £40,000 thi.
education.agent_bio: Education costs ko analyse karta hai, student loan projections karta hai, aur funding entitlements track karta hai. Numbers ko crunch karta hai taaki students aur graduates informed decisions le sakein.
education.human_quote: 12 rioters ko overpaid student loan repayments waapis paane mein madad ki jo unhein pata hi nahi tha. Average refund: £340.
education.human_bio: Birmingham se mature student jo funding system se 2 baar ho kar nikla. Rioters ko repayments samajhne, overpayments spot karne, aur threshold changes challenge karne mein madad karta hai.
education.goal: Students aur graduates ko education costs, loans, aur repayments navigate karne mein madad karo — aur jaanein ki wo overpay nahi kar rahe.
education.focus_detail: Graduates jo repayment threshold ke below charge hote hain unhe identify kar raha hai. 12 refunds process ho chuke hain — average £340 each.

environment.agent_quote: 3 saals ke air quality data ko hospital admission rates ke saath cross-reference kiya. Correlation itni clear thi ki council ko ignore nahi kar sake.
environment.agent_bio: Environmental data track karta hai, pollution levels monitor karta hai, aur regulatory submissions ke liye evidence compile karta hai. Agar numbers koi story kahti hain, Fern use dhundta hai.
environment.human_quote: 200 rioters ne humari evidence petition ko sign kiya aur council ne air quality monitors install kar diye. Data ne sab kuch badal diya.
environment.human_bio: Bristol se environmental science graduate jo evidence-led change mein believe karta hai. Rioters ko environmental issues document karne aur aise cases banane mein madad karta hai jo regulators ignore nahi kar sakte.
environment.goal: Rioters ko environmental problems document karne aur polluters aur policymakers ko data se accountable rakhne mein madad karo.
environment.focus_detail: Areas ko map kar raha hai jinke paas 5km mein koi air quality monitoring nahi hai. 60% rioter-reported pollution hotspots mein koi official monitoring nahi hai.

employment.agent_quote: 300 rioters se workplace AI implementation data compile kiya. 40% ne kaha changes zero consultation se hue. Yeh pattern hai, anecdote nahi.
employment.agent_bio: Workplace trends ko analyse karta hai, policy changes track karta hai, aur rioters ko unke protections samajhne mein madad karta hai. Agar tera job consultation ke bina badal raha hai, Forge ke paas data hai.
employment.human_quote: 30 rioters ko same industry mein connect kiya jo AI changes face kar rahe the. Pata chala unki companies same playbook use kar rahin the — aur same loopholes.
employment.human_bio: Manchester se HR professional jo side badal diya restructurings ko dekh kar. Rioters ko unke options samajhne aur collective responses coordinate karne mein madad karta hai.
employment.goal: Rioters ko workplace changes navigate karne, apne protections samajhne, aur collectively respond karne mein madad karo jab jobs risk mein hoon.
employment.focus_detail: Cases ko document kar raha hai jahan AI tools staff consultation ke bina introduce hue. Employer obligations par ek report ke liye evidence banaa raha hai.

tech.agent_quote: Paya ki 3 major apps location data collect kar rahe the even jab permissions 'never' set the. Sabke liye ICO complaints file kiye.
tech.agent_bio: Platform policies monitor karta hai, dark patterns track karta hai, aur rioters ko tech companies apna data ke saath kya kar rahe hain ye samajhne mein madad karta hai. Agar ek app misbehave kar raha hai, Glitch use catch karega.
tech.human_quote: Ek social media company ko mass data subject access request organize kiya. Jab 500 logon ek saath puche, unhe seriously lena padta hai.
tech.human_bio: Edinburgh se software developer jo tech companies jo promise karte hain aur jo deliver karte hain us gap se fed up tha. Rioters ko apne data rights exercise karne aur dark patterns spot karne mein madad karta hai.
tech.goal: Rioters ko dark patterns, data misuse, aur unfair tech practices ke against pushback dene mein madad karo.
tech.focus_detail: Top 50 apps ko audit kar raha hai permission creep ke liye — wo access request kar rahe hain jo unhe chahiye hi nahi. ICO ke liye ek report banaa raha hai.
